title: US strikes target Iranian military boats
description: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
text: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
speech_text:
US strikes target Iranian military boats.

The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
